scripts.postbuild: ./scripts/preserve-standalone.sh restore && cp -r pen-plotter/assets out/pen-plotter/ && rm -rf out/pen-plotter/assets/medium out/pen-plotter/assets/mediums-all; [ -d pen-plotter/fxhash ] && cp -r pen-plotter/fxhash out/pen-plotter/; [ -d pen-plotter/kandinsky-to-canvas ] && cp -r pen-plotter/kandinsky-to-canvas out/pen-plotter/; true
scripts.lint: eslint && node scripts/lint-experiments.mjs && npm run lint:voice
